debug_info.goal:
a : Array ℤ
h_precond : LongestIncreasingSubsequence_precond a
⊢ LongestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond a (LongestIncreasingSubsequence a h_precond) h_precond

failed_attempts:
unfold LongestIncreasingSubsequence LongestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond
  cases a
  case mk data =>
    cases data
    · simp
    · sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof

unfold LongestIncreasingSubsequence LongestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond
  dsimp
  split
  · next h =>
    have : a = #[] := by
      apply Array.ext
      · simp [h]
      · intro i h1; simp at h1
    subst this; simp
  · next h =>
    simp [Id.run, intMax]
    sorry

unfold LongestIncreasingSubsequence_postcond LongestIncreasingSubsequence
  simp only [intMax, Id.run, Array.size, Array.foldl, List.reverse]
  match a with
  | ⟨[]⟩ => simp [LongestIncreasingSubsequence_precond]
  | ⟨x :: xs⟩ =>
    sorry
  -- !benchmark @end proof
